description: Verify the durable Context, Decide, Act, Evaluate runtime, deterministic controller, hard budgets, and confirmed system iteration boundary.

command: import json,pathlib; m=json.loads(pathlib.Path('agent-system/ai-native-loop.manifest.json').read_text()); assert list(m['stages'])==['context','decide','act','evaluate']; assert set(m['controller']['decisions'])=={'continue','replan','retry','wait_human','complete','fail','cancel','budget_exhausted','debate'}; assert all(m['controller']['default_budgets'][k]>=0 for k in ('max_cycles','max_stage_retries','max_stagnant_cycles','max_duration_seconds','max_tool_calls','max_model_calls','max_cost_microunits')); assert any('Private chain-of-thought' in r for r in m['hard_rules']); assert any('System self-modification' in r for r in m['hard_rules'])

patterns: Confirm, Tune Through Conversation, Pause, Reject

command: set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cp -a agent-system "$tmp/agent-system"; export DIGITAL_OFFICE_SYSTEM_HOME="$tmp/agent-system"; office="$tmp/agent-system/bin/office-system"; manifest="$tmp/agent-system/ai-native-loop.manifest.json"; complete_stage(){ stage="$1"; "$office" loop-stage --run-id loop-test --stage "$stage" --status started --summary "$stage started" >/dev/null; cmd=("$office" loop-stage --run-id loop-test --stage "$stage" --status completed --summary "$stage complete"); while IFS= read -r item; do cmd+=(--artifact "$item:ok"); done < <(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(*json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))["stages"][sys.argv[2]]["required_artifacts"],sep="\n")' "$manifest" "$stage"); while IFS= read -r item; do cmd+=(--gate "$item:passed"); done < <(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(*json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))["stages"][sys.argv[2]]["gates"],sep="\n")' "$manifest" "$stage"); "${cmd[@]}" >/dev/null; }; "$office" loop-start --run-id loop-test --task 'Build a governed AI native product loop' >/dev/null; complete_stage context; complete_stage decide; complete_stage act; complete_stage evaluate; "$office" loop-control --run-id loop-test --decision complete --progress-score 1 --acceptance-passed > "$tmp/complete.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; assert json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))["status"]=="completed"' "$tmp/complete.json"; "$office" loop-start --run-id budget-test --task 'Bounded task' --max-tool-calls 1 >/dev/null; set +e; "$office" loop-usage-add --run-id budget-test --tool-calls 1 > "$tmp/budget.json"; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert d["status"]=="budget_reached"' "$tmp/budget.json"; "$office" iteration-proposal-create --title 'Tighten workflow gate' --target harness --summary 'Add a regression gate after evaluation' --body 'Add a harness check after evaluation.' --expected-impact 'Fewer workflow drifts' --risk 'Could slow delivery' --rollback 'Remove the proposed gate' --run-id loop-test --regression-check 'harness-runner --task all --no-write' > "$tmp/proposal.json"; pid=$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))["proposal_id"])' "$tmp/proposal.json"); set +e; "$office" iteration-proposal-apply --proposal-id "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; "$office" iteration-proposal-decision --proposal-id "$pid" --decision confirm --message 'User confirmed' >/dev/null; "$office" iteration-proposal-apply --proposal-id "$pid" --confirmed --regression-result 'harness passed' --artifact 'agent-system/harness/tasks/ai-native-loop-production.json' > "$tmp/apply.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; assert json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))["status"]=="applied_verified"' "$tmp/apply.json"
